task_description: Create a new NeuroX/ folder in the repo with all files rebranded from python_bridge naming to NeuroX naming. The folder contains neurox/, neurox_v2/, neurox_v3/ (Python packages), NeuroX_EA*.mq5 (EA files), neurox_run*.bat (launchers), and neurox_setup.bat (setup script). All internal references updated except bridge protocol CSV filenames which must stay as-is.
